goal: Generate a square 1:1 card image showing a white Chrysler Pacifica minivan parked at Clearwater Beach with sliding rear door fully open revealing beach gear, Gulf of Mexico turquoise water and white sand visible in background — no people, must read 'beach day family vehicle' instantly at card size.

creative_direction.core_idea: La minivan de Clearwater — puerta abierta, equipaje de playa, Golfo turquesa al fondo
creative_direction.visual_thesis: En card 1:1 debe leer 'playa + familia + minivan' en un vistazo

composition.shot_type: 3/4 rear-side editorial — open sliding door as hero element
composition.layout: Minivan occupies left-to-center frame; open sliding door reveals beach gear; Gulf water visible in background right quadrant

camera.framing: 1:1 square — open door must be fully visible and dominant
camera.angle: 3/4 rear-side, eye level — parallel to the open door plane
camera.depth_of_field: vehicle and open door sharp, Gulf water background softly turquoise and identifiable

overlay_compatibility.text_safe_zone: upper right — sky or blurred Gulf water
overlay_compatibility.logo_safe_zone: lower right corner — sand or pavement

subject.model_reference: Chrysler Pacifica 2022-2024 style — white, sliding rear passenger door fully open
subject.cargo_contents: beach cart visible in open door area — two boogie boards, colorful beach umbrella tip sticking up, small cooler, beach bag
critical_attributes: sliding rear door must be fully open — this is the key visual signal
beach gear loaded and visible in the doorway
no rental company logos or stickers

scene.location: Clearwater Beach parking area — beachfront lot adjacent to white sand, Pinellas County, FL
scene.time_of_day: bright midday Florida sun — no shadows from clouds
environment: Gulf of Mexico turquoise water visible in background — distinctly tropical teal-green
white sand beach at the edge of frame
no commercial signage or resort branding readable
scene.background_view: Gulf of Mexico turquoise water meeting white sand — Clearwater Beach signature palette
critical_scene_rules: No readable beach resort or parking lot signage
Open sliding door must be the dominant visual element — fully open, not ajar
Gulf water must be visibly turquoise — this identifies Clearwater, not generic beach

lighting.type: Florida midday direct sun — bright, zero-shadow clouds
effects: clean white paint highlights along minivan body
interior of open door lit by ambient outdoor light — gear clearly visible
Gulf water sparkles in background — sun glitter on turquoise surface
white sand reflects warm light upward

accent: colorful beach umbrella in door — coral or teal
rules: Turquoise water must read clearly against white sand and white vehicle
Open door area must contrast enough to see beach gear
Palette: white + turquoise + sky blue — clean Gulf Coast family aesthetic
No dark or moody tones — this is pure beach day energy

negative_prompt: no dirty or sandy vehicle exterior
master_prompt: Create a square 1:1 editorial image at 2048x2048 pixels for a car rental marketplace showing a clean white Chrysler Pacifica minivan parked at a Clearwater Beach beachfront parking area with the sliding rear passenger door fully open. No people. Shot from a 3/4 rear-side angle at eye level with a 35mm lens. The open sliding door is the dominant visual element — visible inside the doorway is a beach cart with two boogie boards, a colorful coral or teal beach umbrella tip pointing up, a small cooler, and a beach bag. The Gulf of Mexico is clearly visible in the background right quadrant: turquoise-teal water meeting white sand under a vivid Florida blue sky. The minivan is white and spotless with clean midday sun highlights along the body. White sand beach edge visible at the bottom of frame. No readable signage, no resort branding, no rental logos. The image must instantly communicate 'family beach day at Clearwater — the minivan is loaded and ready' at card size. Avoid people, passengers, children, closed door, overcast sky, mountains, theme park context, Atlantic Ocean visuals, and any text or watermarks.
